info.description:
Sequence API

This specification covers the metadata endpoints of the API.
info.title: Sequence API - Metadata API

post.description: NOTE: projectID is optional. If it's passed it will be used, otherwise the projectID will be retrieved based on the X-Access-Key. As well, user's still need to pass Authorization header for the user's auth. For more information see: https://github.com/0xsequence/builder/tree/master/api#sequence-stack-and-user-project-permissions
Token Directory. NOTE: this only searches the 'token-directory' items. Use 'SearchContracts' or 'SearchTokens' for everything else.
Contract Info -- returns contract meta-info for contracts found in registered chain's token-lists
Niftyswap querying data map of tokenID :: quantity
GetTokenMetadata - fetch token metadata for a particular contract and respective tokenIDs

GetTokenMetadataBatch allows you to query the token metadata of a batch of contracts and respective tokenIDs where map is contractAddress::[]tokenID => contractAddress::[]TokenMetadata
Note, we limit each request to 50 contracts max and 50 tokens max per contract.
Search Contract Info across all chains token-lists. Similar to GetContractInfo above, but it will traverse all chains and results from all.
Deprecated: Use SearchTokens() and SearchContracts() instead.

TaskStatus.description: Represented as uint8 on the server side

ContractType.description: Represented as uint16 on the server side

SwapType.description: Represented as uint32 on the server side

PropertyType.description: Represented as uint32 on the server side

SortOrder.description: Represented as uint32 on the server side

ApiKeyAuth.description: Project access key for authenticating requests, get an access key at https://sequence.build
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Access-Key
